title: The Social Robot & Active Appliance Interaction Loop
description: A flowchart depicting the continuous feedback loop between a user, a social robot or active appliance, and the environment, highlighting the human-centred design principles.
relationships: The User provides input and receives output through natural interaction. The appliance senses the environment and acts upon it. All actions are governed by an overarching human-centred design and ethics framework that prioritizes user benefit, transparency, and safety.
